trigger_context: User reported emergency fix success for Claude CLI UI cascade regression

task_analysis.requirements: Real-time terminal application UI rendering without cascade failures

failure_pattern.original_approach: Complex input buffering + output batching optimization
failure_pattern.root_cause: Custom buffering logic fragmenting terminal control sequences

working_solution.approach: Direct PTY passthrough with standard configuration

Direct WebSocket passthrough with no processing layers
